About the Curator

The rental
wardrobe

The Nuor Edit is the rental arm of Valet By Nuor, curated by Selena — a Tampa-based artist and stylist who sees fashion as a form of creative expression. She created The Nuor Edit after years of watching visitors arrive in the wrong wardrobe for Florida's warmth, colour, and waterfront energy.

As an artist, Selena is drawn to pieces with personality — prints that tell a story, textures with depth, colours that feel alive. Rent the whole edit for your stay, or cherry-pick the pieces that speak to you. Everything is delivered to your hotel before you arrive.
